overview: Delaware Integrative Medicine is the area leader in regenerative medicine for autoimmune, degenerative, inflammatory, and orthopedic conditions. The clinic offers bioidentical hormone therapy, peptide therapy, IV nutrient therapy, and integrative treatment approaches.
highlights: Regenerative medicine and stem cell therapy
Lyme disease specialist (Lyme Literate Medical Doctor)
targetAudience: Patients seeking regenerative medicine and integrative treatment approaches for chronic pain, hormone imbalances, and degenerative conditions.
